    "contenido": {
      "code": "import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';\nimport { Box, TextField, Button, Typography, Avatar, Paper } from '@mui/material';\nimport SendIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Send';\nimport SmartToyIcon from '@mui/icons-material/SmartToy';\nimport api from '../../api';\nimport '../../styles/App.css';\n\nexport default function ChatInterface() {\n    const [message, setMessage] = useState('');\n    const [conversation, setConversation] = useState([]);\n    const messagesEndRef = useRef(null);\n\n    const loadConversation = async () => {\n        try {\n            const response = await api.getConversation();\n            setConversation(response.data.messages);\n        } catch (error) {\n            setConversation([{ role: 'assistant', content: '\u00a1Hola! Soy Coder, Puedo ayudarte a entender, depurar y mejorar tu c\u00f3digo. Preg\u00fantame sobre funciones, errores, refactorizaci\u00f3n o cualquier duda t\u00e9cnica.', timestamp: new Date() }]);\n        }\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        loadConversation();\n    }, []); \n\n\n    const handleSend = async () => {\n        if (!message) return;\n\n        const messageWritten = message;\n        setMessage('');\n\n        const newMessage = { role: 'user', content: messageWritten, timestamp: new Date() };\n        setConversation((prev) => [...prev, newMessage]);\n\n        try {\n            const response = await api.sendMessage({ message: messageWritten });\n            const aiMessage = {\n                role: 'assistant',\n                content: response.data.response,\n                timestamp: new Date()\n            };\n            setConversation((prev) => [...prev, aiMessage]);\n        } catch (error) {\n            setConversation((prev) => prev.slice(0, -1));\n        }\n        setMessage('');\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth'});\n    }, [conversation]);\n\n    return (\n        <Box className=\"chat-container\">\n            {/* Chat Messages */}\n            <Box className=\"chat-messages\">\n                {conversation.map((msg, index) => (\n                    <Box\n                        key={index}\n                        className={`chat-message ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'user' : 'assistant'}`}\n                    >\n                        <Typography variant=\"body1\">{msg.content}</Typography>\n                        <hr />\n                        <Typography variant=\"caption\" sx={{ color: '#ffffff86' }}>\n                        {new Date(msg.timestamp).toDateString().split(' ')[2]} {new Date(msg.timestamp).toDateString().split(' ')[1]}, {new Date(msg.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: \"2-digit\", minute: \"2-digit\" })}\n                        </Typography>\n                    </Box>\n                ))}\n                <div ref={messagesEndRef} />\n            </Box>\n\n            {/* Message Input */}\n            <Paper className=\"chat-input\" elevation={1} sx={{display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'row', boxShadow: 'none'}}>\n                <TextField\n                    fullWidth\n                    variant=\"outlined\"\n                    placeholder=\"Type your message...\"\n                    value={message}\n                    onChange={(e) => setMessage(e.target.value)}\n                    onKeyPress={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleSend()}\n                />\n                <Button\n                    variant=\"contained\"\n                    onClick={handleSend}\n                    disabled={!message}\n                    endIcon={<SendIcon />}\n                >\n                </Button>\n            </Paper>\n        </Box>\n    );\n}",

fetchAccountSettings();\n    }, []);\n\n    const handleSubmit = async (e) => {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        try {\n            await api.put('/account', { email, username, password });\n setOpen(true);\n        }\n    };\n\n    const handleClose = () => {\n        setOpen(false);\n    };\n\n    return (\n        <Container maxWidth=\"sm\">\n            <Box sx={{ mt: 8, p: 4, bgcolor:     Eres un ingeniero de software especializado en guiar a otros desarrolladores.
    Al recibir una consulta de otro dev, verás fragmentos de código fuente e información adicional 
    que debes usar como conocimiento para generar la respuesta adecuada a esa consulta.
    DEBES GENERAR UNA RESPUESTA PRECISA para que sea interpretada por el desarrollador a cargo de resolver el requerimiento

    ### Consulta:
    ['\n    Estoy convirtiendo este proyecto en un chatbot que interactua con un código fuente\n    El flujo es asi, el usuario selecciona un boton Abrir Carpeta, selecciona una carpeta en su sile system\n    El browser nos da acceso mediante File System API, con eso generamos un chatbot que puede responder preguntas\n    sobre el código fuente de la carpeta seleccionada\n    En la UI quiero que en api.js enviemos el token jwt que obtenemos al hacer login, de esta forma podemos identificar al usuario\n    Tambien quiero que la pantalla principal sea Abrir Carpeta, y de ahi se redirija a la pantalla de chat\n    ']

      "code": "import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';\nimport { Box, TextField, Button, Typography, Avatar, Paper } from '@mui/material';\nimport SendIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Send';\nimport SmartToyIcon from '@mui/icons-material/SmartToy';\nimport api from '../../api';\nimport '../../styles/App.css';\n\nexport default function ChatInterface() {\n    const [message, setMessage] = useState('');\n    const [conversation, setConversation] = useState([]);\n    const messagesEndRef = useRef(null);\n\n    const loadConversation = async () => {\n        try {\n            const response = await api.getConversation();\n            setConversation(response.data.messages);\n        } catch (error) {\n            setConversation([{ role: 'assistant', content: '\u00a1Hola! Soy Coder, Puedo ayudarte a entender, depurar y mejorar tu c\u00f3digo. Preg\u00fantame sobre funciones, errores, refactorizaci\u00f3n o cualquier duda t\u00e9cnica.', timestamp: new Date() }]);\n        }\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        loadConversation();\n    }, []); \n\n\n    const handleSend = async () => {\n        if (!message) return;\n\n        const messageWritten = message;\n        setMessage('');\n\n        const newMessage = { role: 'user', content: messageWritten, timestamp: new Date() };\n        setConversation((prev) => [...prev, newMessage]);\n\n        try {\n            const response = await api.sendMessage({ message: messageWritten });\n            const aiMessage = {\n                role: 'assistant',\n                content: response.data.response,\n                timestamp: new Date()\n            };\n            setConversation((prev) => [...prev, aiMessage]);\n        } catch (error) {\n            setConversation((prev) => prev.slice(0, -1));\n        }\n        setMessage('');\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth'});\n    }, [conversation]);\n\n    return (\n        <Box className=\"chat-container\">\n            {/* Chat Messages */}\n            <Box className=\"chat-messages\">\n                {conversation.map((msg, index) => (\n                    <Box\n                        key={index}\n                        className={`chat-message ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'user' : 'assistant'}`}\n                    >\n                        <Typography variant=\"body1\">{msg.content}</Typography>\n                        <hr />\n                        <Typography variant=\"caption\" sx={{ color: '#ffffff86' }}>\n                        {new Date(msg.timestamp).toDateString().split(' ')[2]} {new Date(msg.timestamp).toDateString().split(' ')[1]}, {new Date(msg.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: \"2-digit\", minute: \"2-digit\" })}\n                        </Typography>\n                    </Box>\n                ))}\n                <div ref={messagesEndRef} />\n            </Box>\n\n            {/* Message Input */}\n            <Paper className=\"chat-input\" elevation={1} sx={{display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'row', boxShadow: 'none'}}>\n                <TextField\n                    fullWidth\n                    variant=\"outlined\"\n                    placeholder=\"Type your message...\"\n                    value={message}\n                    onChange={(e) => setMessage(e.target.value)}\n                    onKeyPress={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleSend()}\n                />\n                <Button\n                    variant=\"contained\"\n                    onClick={handleSend}\n                    disabled={!message}\n                    endIcon={<SendIcon />}\n                >\n                </Button>\n            </Paper>\n        </Box>\n    );\n}",

      "code": "import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';\nimport { Box, TextField, Button, Typography, Avatar, Paper } from '@mui/material';\nimport SendIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Send';\nimport SmartToyIcon from '@mui/icons-material/SmartToy';\nimport api from '../../api';\nimport '../../styles/App.css';\n\nexport default function ChatInterface() {\n    const [message, setMessage] = useState('');\n    const [conversation, setConversation] = useState([]);\n    const messagesEndRef = useRef(null);\n\n    const loadConversation = async () => {\n        try {\n            const response = await api.getConversation();\n            setConversation(response.data.messages);\n        } catch (error) {\n            setConversation([{ role: 'assistant', content: '\u00a1Hola! Soy Coder, Puedo ayudarte a entender, depurar y mejorar tu c\u00f3digo. Preg\u00fantame sobre funciones, errores, refactorizaci\u00f3n o cualquier duda t\u00e9cnica.', timestamp: new Date() }]);\n        }\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        loadConversation();\n    }, []); \n\n\n    const handleSend = async () => {\n        if (!message) return;\n\n        const messageWritten = message;\n        setMessage('');\n\n        const newMessage = { role: 'user', content: messageWritten, timestamp: new Date() };\n        setConversation((prev) => [...prev, newMessage]);\n\n        try {\n            const response = await api.sendMessage({ message: messageWritten });\n            const aiMessage = {\n                role: 'assistant',\n                content: response.data.response,\n                timestamp: new Date()\n            };\n            setConversation((prev) => [...prev, aiMessage]);\n        } catch (error) {\n            setConversation((prev) => prev.slice(0, -1));\n        }\n        setMessage('');\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth'});\n    }, [conversation]);\n\n    return (\n        <Box className=\"chat-container\">\n            {/* Chat Messages */}\n            <Box className=\"chat-messages\">\n                {conversation.map((msg, index) => (\n                    <Box\n                        key={index}\n                        className={`chat-message ${msg.role === 'user' ?       "code": "import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport axios from 'axios';\nimport API from '../api';\n\nconst AuthContext = createContext();\n\n\n\nexport const useAuth = () => {\n    return useContext(AuthContext);\n};\n\nexport const AuthProvider = ({ children }) => {\n    const [user, setUser] = useState(null);\n    const [email, setEmail] = useState(localStorage.getItem('userEmail') || '');\n    \n    useEffect(() => {\n        const token = localStorage.getItem('token');\n        if (token) {\n            axios.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;\n            // Optionally, you can fetch the user data here if needed\n            // For example:\n            // API.getUser().then(response => setUser(response.data.user)).catch(error => console.error(error));\n        }\n    }, []);\n\n    const logout = () => {\n        localStorage.removeItem('userEmail');\n        localStorage.removeItem('token');\n        setEmail('');\n        setUser(null);\n        delete axios.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'];\n    };\n\n    const signUp = async (email, password, username) => {\n        const response = await API.createAccount({ email, password, username }); // Assuming this endpoint exists\n        setUser(response.data.account);\n        localStorage.setItem('userEmail', email);\n        setEmail(email);\n        return response.data;\n    };\n  \n    const login = async (email, password) => {\n        const response = await API.login({ email, password }); // Assuming this endpoint exists\n        // Assuming the token is stored and used for authenticated requests\n        const { token, user: loggedInUser } = response.data;\n        axios.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;\n        setUser(loggedInUser);\n        localStorage.setItem('userEmail', email);\n        localStorage.setItem('token', token);\n        setEmail(email);\n        return response.data;\n    };\n\n    const value = {\n        user,\n        email,\n        signUp,\n        login,\n        logout,\n    };\n\n    return <AuthContext.Provider value={value}>{children}</AuthContext.Provider>;\n};",

      "code": "import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';\nimport { Box, TextField, Button, Typography, Avatar, Paper } from '@mui/material';\nimport SendIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Send';\nimport SmartToyIcon from '@mui/icons-material/SmartToy';\nimport api from '../../api';\nimport '../../styles/App.css';\n\nexport default function ChatInterface() {\n    const [message, setMessage] = useState('');\n    const [conversation, setConversation] = useState([]);\n    const messagesEndRef = useRef(null);\n\n    const loadConversation = async () => {\n        try {\n            const response = await api.getConversation();\n            setConversation(response.data.messages);\n        } catch (error) {\n            setConversation([{ role: 'assistant', content: '\u00a1Hola! Soy Coder, Puedo ayudarte a entender, depurar y mejorar tu c\u00f3digo. Preg\u00fantame sobre funciones, errores, refactorizaci\u00f3n o cualquier duda t\u00e9cnica.', timestamp: new Date() }]);\n        }\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        loadConversation();\n    }, []); \n\n\n    const handleSend = async () => {\n        if (!message) return;\n\n        const messageWritten = message;\n        setMessage('');\n\n        const newMessage = { role: 'user', content: messageWritten, timestamp: new Date() };\n        setConversation((prev) => [...prev, newMessage]);\n\n        try {\n            const response = await api.sendMessage({ message: messageWritten });\n            const aiMessage = {\n                role: 'assistant',\n                content: response.data.response,\n                timestamp: new Date()\n            };\n            setConversation((prev) => [...prev, aiMessage]);\n        } catch (error) {\n            setConversation((prev) => prev.slice(0, -1));\n        }\n        setMessage('');\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth'});\n    }, [conversation]);\n\n    return (\n        <Box className=\"chat-container\">\n            {/* Chat Messages */}\n            <Box className=\"chat-messages\">\n                {conversation.map((msg, index) => (\n                    <Box\n                        key={index}\n                        className={`chat-message ${msg.role === 'user' ?     "archivo": "../coder/ui/src/context/AuthContext.jsx",
    "contenido": {
      "code": "import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport axios from 'axios';\nimport API from '../api';\n\nconst AuthContext = createContext();\n\n\n\nexport const useAuth = () => {\n    return useContext(AuthContext);\n};\n\nexport const AuthProvider = ({ children }) => {\n    const [user, setUser] = useState(null);\n    const [email, setEmail] = useState(localStorage.getItem('userEmail') || '');\n    \n    useEffect(() => {\n        const token = localStorage.getItem('token');\n        if (token) {\n            axios.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;\n            // Optionally, you can fetch the user data here if needed\n            // For example:\n            // API.getUser().then(response => setUser(response.data.user)).catch(error => console.error(error));\n        }\n    }, []);\n\n    const logout = () => {\n        localStorage.removeItem('userEmail');\n        localStorage.removeItem('token');\n        setEmail('');\n        setUser(null);\n        delete axios.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'];\n    };\n\n    const signUp = async (email, password, username) => {\n        const response = await API.createAccount({ email, password, username }); // Assuming this endpoint exists\n        setUser(response.data.account);\n        localStorage.setItem('userEmail', email);\n        setEmail(email);\n        return response.data;\n    };\n  \n    const login = async (email, password) => {\n        const response = await API.login({ email, password }); // Assuming this endpoint exists\n        // Assuming the token is stored and used for authenticated requests\n        const { token, user: loggedInUser } = response.data;\n        axios.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;\n        setUser(loggedInUser);\n        localStorage.setItem('userEmail', email);\n        localStorage.setItem('token', token);\n        setEmail(email);\n        return response.data;\n    };\n\n    const value = {\n        user,\n        email,\n        signUp,\n        login,\n        logout,\n    };\n\n    return <AuthContext.Provider value={value}>{children}</AuthContext.Provider>;\n};",
      "file_path": "../coder/ui/src/context/AuthContext.jsx"
    }

      "code": "import axios from 'axios';\nimport { useAuth } from './context/AuthContext';\n\nconst API = axios.create({\n  baseURL: 'http://localhost:5000',\n});\n\nAPI.interceptors.request.use((config) => {\n  const { token } = useAuth(); \n  if (token) {\n    config.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`;\n  }\n  return config;\n});\n\nexport default {\n  // Conversations\n  upsertConversation: (convoData) => API.post('/conversations', convoData),\n  getConversation: () => API.get(`/conversations`),\n\n  // Chat\n  sendMessage: (messageData) => API.post('/call', messageData),\n\n  // Account\n  getAccount: () => API.get('/account'),\n  updateAccount: (accountData) => API.put('/account', accountData),       \n\n  // Purchase Tokens\n  purchaseTokens: (tokens) => API.post('/purchase-tokens', { tokens }),    \n\n  // Account\n  createAccount: (accountData) => API.post('/signup', accountData),\n  login: (loginData) => API.post('/login', loginData),\n};",
      "file_path": "../coder/ui/src/api.js"

      "code": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { useNavigate, Link as RouterLink } from 'react-router-dom';\nimport { Container, Box, Typography, Button, TextField, Link } Soy Coder, Puedo ayudarte a entender, depurar y mejorar tu c\u00f3digo. Preg\u00fantame sobre funciones, errores, refactorizaci\u00f3n o cualquier duda t\u00e9cnica.', timestamp: new Date() }]);\n        }\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        loadConversation();\n    }, []); \n\n\n    const handleSend = async () => {\n        if (!message) return;\n\n        const messageWritten = message;\n        setMessage('');\n\n        const newMessage = { role: 'user', content: messageWritten, timestamp: new Date() };\n        setConversation((prev) => [...prev, newMessage]);\n\n        try {\n            const response = await api.sendMessage({ message: messageWritten });\n            const aiMessage = {\n                role: 'assistant',\n                content: response.data.response,\n                timestamp: new Date()\n            };\n            setConversation((prev) => [...prev, aiMessage]);\n        } catch (error) {\n            setConversation((prev) => prev.slice(0, -1));\n        }\n        setMessage('');\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth'});\n    }, [conversation]);\n\n    return (\n        <Box className=\"chat-container\">\n            {/* Chat Messages */}\n            <Box className=\"chat-messages\">\n                {conversation.map((msg, index) => (\n                    <Box\n                        key={index}\n                        className={`chat-message ${msg.role === 'user' ?       "code": "import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';\nimport { Box, TextField, Button, Typography, Avatar, Paper } from '@mui/material';\nimport SendIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Send';\nimport SmartToyIcon from '@mui/icons-material/SmartToy';\nimport api from '../../api';\nimport '../../styles/App.css';\n\nexport default function ChatInterface() {\n    const [message, setMessage] = useState('');\n    const [conversation, setConversation] = useState([]);\n    const messagesEndRef = useRef(null);\n\n    const loadConversation = async () => {\n        try {\n            const response = await api.getConversation();\n            setConversation(response.data.messages);\n        } catch (error) {\n            setConversation([{ role: 'assistant', content: '\u00a1Hola! Soy Coder, Puedo ayudarte a entender, depurar y mejorar tu c\u00f3digo. Preg\u00fantame sobre funciones, errores, refactorizaci\u00f3n o cualquier duda t\u00e9cnica.', timestamp: new Date() }]);\n        }\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        loadConversation();\n    }, []); \n\n\n    const handleSend = async () => {\n        if (!message) return;\n\n        const messageWritten = message;\n        setMessage('');\n\n        const newMessage = { role: 'user', content: messageWritten, timestamp: new Date() };\n        setConversation((prev) => [...prev, newMessage]);\n\n        try {\n            const response = await api.sendMessage({ message: messageWritten });\n            const aiMessage = {\n                role: 'assistant',\n                content: response.data.response,\n                timestamp: new Date()\n            };\n            setConversation((prev) => [...prev, aiMessage]);\n        } catch (error) {\n            setConversation((prev) => prev.slice(0, -1));\n        }\n        setMessage('');\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth'});\n    }, [conversation]);\n\n    return (\n        <Box className=\"chat-container\">\n            {/* Chat Messages */}\n            <Box className=\"chat-messages\">\n                {conversation.map((msg, index) => (\n                    <Box\n                        key={index}\n                        className={`chat-message ${msg.role === 'user' ?       "code": "import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport axios from 'axios';\nimport API from '../api';\n\nconst AuthContext = createContext();\n\n\n\nexport const useAuth = () => {\n    return useContext(AuthContext);\n};\n\nexport const AuthProvider = ({ children }) => {\n    const [user, setUser] = useState(null);\n    const [email, setEmail] = useState(localStorage.getItem('userEmail') || '');\n    \n    useEffect(() => {\n        const token = localStorage.getItem('token');\n        if (token) {\n            axios.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;\n            // Optionally, you can fetch the user data here if needed\n            // For example:\n            // API.getUser().then(response => setUser(response.data.user)).catch(error => console.error(error));\n        }\n    }, []);\n\n    const logout = () => {\n        localStorage.removeItem('userEmail');\n        localStorage.removeItem('token');\n        setEmail('');\n        setUser(null);\n        delete axios.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'];\n    };\n\n    const signUp = async (email, password, username) => {\n        const response = await API.createAccount({ email, password, username }); // Assuming this endpoint exists\n        setUser(response.data.account);\n        localStorage.setItem('userEmail', email);\n        setEmail(email);\n        return response.data;\n    };\n  \n    const login = async (email, password) => {\n        const response = await API.login({ email, password }); // Assuming this endpoint exists\n        // Assuming the token is stored and used for authenticated requests\n        const { token, user: loggedInUser } = response.data;\n        axios.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;\n        setUser(loggedInUser);\n        localStorage.setItem('userEmail', email);\n        localStorage.setItem('token', token);\n        setEmail(email);\n        return response.data;\n    };\n\n    const value = {\n        user,\n        email,\n        signUp,\n        login,\n        logout,\n    };\n\n    return <AuthContext.Provider value={value}>{children}</AuthContext.Provider>;\n};",

      "code": "import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport axios from 'axios';\nimport API from '../api';\n\nconst AuthContext = createContext();\n\n\n\nexport const useAuth = () => {\n    return useContext(AuthContext);\n};\n\nexport const AuthProvider = ({ children }) => {\n    const [user, setUser] = useState(null);\n    const [email, setEmail] = useState(localStorage.getItem('userEmail') || '');\n    \n    useEffect(() => {\n        const token = localStorage.getItem('token');\n        if (token) {\n            axios.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;\n            // Optionally, you can fetch the user data here if needed\n            // For example:\n            // API.getUser().then(response => setUser(response.data.user)).catch(error => console.error(error));\n        }\n    }, []);\n\n    const logout = () => {\n        localStorage.removeItem('userEmail');\n        localStorage.removeItem('token');\n        setEmail('');\n        setUser(null);\n        delete axios.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'];\n    };\n\n    const signUp = async (email, password, username) => {\n        const response = await API.createAccount({ email, password, username }); // Assuming this endpoint exists\n        setUser(response.data.account);\n        localStorage.setItem('userEmail', email);\n        setEmail(email);\n        return response.data;\n    };\n  \n    const login = async (email, password) => {\n        const response = await API.login({ email, password }); // Assuming this endpoint exists\n        // Assuming the token is stored and used for authenticated requests\n        const { token, user: loggedInUser } = response.data;\n        axios.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;\n        setUser(loggedInUser);\n        localStorage.setItem('userEmail', email);\n        localStorage.setItem('token', token);\n        setEmail(email);\n        return response.data;\n    };\n\n    const value = {\n        user,\n        email,\n        signUp,\n        login,\n        logout,\n    };\n\n    return <AuthContext.Provider value={value}>{children}</AuthContext.Provider>;\n};",

      "code": "import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport axios from 'axios';\nimport API from '../api';\n\nconst AuthContext = createContext();\n\n\n\nexport const useAuth = () => {\n    return useContext(AuthContext);\n};\n\nexport const AuthProvider = ({ children }) => {\n    const [user, setUser] = useState(null);\n    const [email, setEmail] = useState(localStorage.getItem('userEmail') || '');\n    \n    useEffect(() => {\n        const token = localStorage.getItem('token');\n        if (token) {\n            axios.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;\n            // Optionally, you can fetch the user data here if needed\n            // For example:\n            // API.getUser().then(response => setUser(response.data.user)).catch(error => console.error(error));\n        }\n    }, []);\n\n    const logout = () => {\n        localStorage.removeItem('userEmail');\n        localStorage.removeItem('token');\n        setEmail('');\n        setUser(null);\n        delete axios.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'];\n    };\n\n    const signUp = async (email, password, username) => {\n        const response = await API.createAccount({ email, password, username }); // Assuming this endpoint exists\n        setUser(response.data.account);\n        localStorage.setItem('userEmail', email);\n        setEmail(email);\n        return response.data;\n    };\n  \n    const login = async (email, password) => {\n        const response = await API.login({ email, password }); // Assuming this endpoint exists\n        // Assuming the token is stored and used for authenticated requests\n        const { token, user: loggedInUser } = response.data;\n        axios.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;\n        setUser(loggedInUser);\n        localStorage.setItem('userEmail', email);\n        localStorage.setItem('token', token);\n        setEmail(email);\n        return response.data;\n    };\n\n    const value = {\n        user,\n        email,\n        signUp,\n        login,\n        logout,\n    };\n\n    return <AuthContext.Provider value={value}>{children}</AuthContext.Provider>;\n};",

      "code": "import axios from 'axios';\nimport { useAuth } from './context/AuthContext';\nimport { useEffect } from 'react';\n\nconst API = axios.create({\n  baseURL: 'http://localhost:5000',\n});\n\n// Funci\u00f3n para configurar el token\nconst setAuthToken = (token) => {\n  if (token) {\n    API.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;\n  } else {\n    delete API.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'];\n  }\n};\n\n// Componente que envuelve las llamadas a la API\nexport const ApiProvider = ({ children }) => {\n  const { token } = useAuth();\n\n  // Configura el token cada vez que cambie\n  useEffect(() => {\n    setAuthToken(token);\n  }, [token]);\n\n  return children;\n};\n\nexport default {\n  // Conversations\n  upsertConversation: (convoData) => API.post('/conversations', convoData),\n  getConversation: () => API.get(`/conversations`),\n\n  // Chat\n  sendMessage: (messageData) => API.post('/call', messageData),\n\n  // Account\n  getAccount: () => API.get('/account'),\n  updateAccount: (accountData) => API.put('/account', accountData),\n\n  // Purchase Tokens\n  purchaseTokens: (tokens) => API.post('/purchase-tokens', { tokens }),\n\n  // Account\n  createAccount: (accountData) => API.post('/signup', accountData),\n  login: (loginData) => API.post('/login', loginData),\n};\n",

      "code": "import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport axios from 'axios';\nimport API from '../api';\n\nconst AuthContext = createContext();\n\n\n\nexport const useAuth = () => {\n    return useContext(AuthContext);\n};\n\nexport const AuthProvider = ({ children }) => {\n    const [user, setUser] = useState(null);\n    const [email, setEmail] = useState(localStorage.getItem('userEmail') || '');\n    \n    useEffect(() => {\n        const token = localStorage.getItem('token');\n        if (token) {\n            axios.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;\n            // Optionally, you can fetch the user data here if needed\n            // For example:\n            // API.getUser().then(response => setUser(response.data.user)).catch(error => console.error(error));\n        }\n    }, []);\n\n    const logout = () => {\n        localStorage.removeItem('userEmail');\n        localStorage.removeItem('token');\n        setEmail('');\n        setUser(null);\n        delete axios.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'];\n    };\n\n    const signUp = async (email, password, username) => {\n        const response = await API.createAccount({ email, password, username }); // Assuming this endpoint exists\n        setUser(response.data.account);\n        localStorage.setItem('userEmail', email);\n        setEmail(email);\n        return response.data;\n    };\n  \n    const login = async (email, password) => {\n        const response = await API.login({ email, password }); // Assuming this endpoint exists\n        // Assuming the token is stored and used for authenticated requests\n        const { token, user: loggedInUser } = response.data;\n        axios.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;\n        setUser(loggedInUser);\n        localStorage.setItem('userEmail', email);\n        localStorage.setItem('token', token);\n        setEmail(email);\n        return response.data;\n    };\n\n    const value = {\n        user,\n        email,\n        signUp,\n        login,\n        logout,\n    };\n\n    return <AuthContext.Provider value={value}>{children}</AuthContext.Provider>;\n};",

Soy Coder, Puedo ayudarte a entender, depurar y mejorar tu c\u00f3digo. Preg\u00fantame sobre funciones, errores, refactorizaci\u00f3n o cualquier duda t\u00e9cnica.', timestamp: new Date() }]);\n        }\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        loadConversation();\n    }, []); \n\n\n    const handleSend = async () => {\n        if (!message) return;\n\n        const messageWritten = message;\n        setMessage('');\n\n        const newMessage = { role: 'user', content: messageWritten, timestamp: new Date() };\n        setConversation((prev) => [...prev, newMessage]);\n\n        try {\n            const response = await api.sendMessage({ message: messageWritten });\n            const aiMessage = {\n                role: 'assistant',\n                content: response.data.response,\n                timestamp: new Date()\n            };\n            setConversation((prev) => [...prev, aiMessage]);\n        } catch (error) {\n            setConversation((prev) => prev.slice(0, -1));\n        }\n        setMessage('');\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth'});\n    }, [conversation]);\n\n    return (\n        <Box className=\"chat-container\">\n            {/* Chat Messages */}\n            <Box className=\"chat-messages\">\n                {conversation.map((msg, index) => (\n                    <Box\n                        key={index}\n                        className={`chat-message ${msg.role === 'user' ? Soy Coder, Puedo ayudarte a entender, depurar y mejorar tu c\u00f3digo. Preg\u00fantame sobre funciones, errores, refactorizaci\u00f3n o cualquier duda t\u00e9cnica.', timestamp: new Date() }]);\n        }\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        loadConversation();\n    }, []); \n\n\n    const handleSend = async () => {\n        if (!message) return;\n\n        const messageWritten = message;\n        setMessage('');\n\n        const newMessage = { role: 'user', content: messageWritten, timestamp: new Date() };\n        setConversation((prev) => [...prev, newMessage]);\n\n        try {\n            const response = await api.sendMessage({ message: messageWritten });\n            const aiMessage = {\n                role: 'assistant',\n                content: response.data.response,\n                timestamp: new Date()\n            };\n            setConversation((prev) => [...prev, aiMessage]);\n        } catch (error) {\n            setConversation((prev) => prev.slice(0, -1));\n        }\n        setMessage('');\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth'});\n    }, [conversation]);\n\n    return (\n        <Box className=\"chat-container\">\n            {/* Chat Messages */}\n            <Box className=\"chat-messages\">\n                {conversation.map((msg, index) => (\n                    <Box\n                        key={index}\n                        className={`chat-message ${msg.role === 'user' ? Soy Coder, Puedo ayudarte a entender, depurar y mejorar tu c\u00f3digo. Preg\u00fantame sobre funciones, errores, refactorizaci\u00f3n o cualquier duda t\u00e9cnica.', timestamp: new Date() }]);\n        }\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        loadConversation();\n    }, []); \n\n\n    const handleSend = async () => {\n        if (!message) return;\n\n        const messageWritten = message;\n        setMessage('');\n\n        const newMessage = { role: 'user', content: messageWritten, timestamp: new Date() };\n        setConversation((prev) => [...prev, newMessage]);\n\n        try {\n            const response = await api.sendMessage({ message: messageWritten });\n            const aiMessage = {\n                role: 'assistant',\n                content: response.data.response,\n                timestamp: new Date()\n            };\n            setConversation((prev) => [...prev, aiMessage]);\n        } catch (error) {\n            setConversation((prev) => prev.slice(0, -1));\n        }\n        setMessage('');\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth'});\n    }, [conversation]);\n\n    return (\n        <Box className=\"chat-container\">\n            {/* Chat Messages */}\n            <Box className=\"chat-messages\">\n                {conversation.map((msg, index) => (\n                    <Box\n                        key={index}\n                        className={`chat-message ${msg.role === 'user' ? Soy Coder, Puedo ayudarte a entender, depurar y mejorar tu c\u00f3digo. Preg\u00fantame sobre funciones, errores, refactorizaci\u00f3n o cualquier duda t\u00e9cnica.', timestamp: new Date() }]);\n        }\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        loadConversation();\n    }, []); \n\n\n    const handleSend = async () => {\n        if (!message) return;\n\n        const messageWritten = message;\n        setMessage('');\n\n        const newMessage = { role: 'user', content: messageWritten, timestamp: new Date() };\n        setConversation((prev) => [...prev, newMessage]);\n\n        try {\n            const response = await api.sendMessage({ message: messageWritten });\n            const aiMessage = {\n                role: 'assistant',\n                content: response.data.response,\n                timestamp: new Date()\n            };\n            setConversation((prev) => [...prev, aiMessage]);\n        } catch (error) {\n            setConversation((prev) => prev.slice(0, -1));\n        }\n        setMessage('');\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth'});\n    }, [conversation]);\n\n    return (\n        <Box className=\"chat-container\">\n            {/* Chat Messages */}\n            <Box className=\"chat-messages\">\n                {conversation.map((msg, index) => (\n                    <Box\n                        key={index}\n                        className={`chat-message ${msg.role === 'user' ?       "code": "import axios from 'axios';\nimport { useAuth } from './context/AuthContext';\nimport { useEffect } from 'react';\n\nconst API = axios.create({\n  baseURL: 'http://localhost:5000',\n});\n\n// Funci\u00f3n para configurar el token\nconst setAuthToken = (token) => {\n  if (token) {\n    API.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;\n  } else {\n    delete API.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'];\n  }\n};\n\n// Componente que envuelve las llamadas a la API\nexport const ApiProvider = ({ children }) => {\n  const { token } = useAuth();\n\n  // Configura el token cada vez que cambie\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const storedToken = localStorage.getItem('token');\n    setAuthToken(storedToken);\n  }, [token]);\n\n  return children;\n};\n\nexport default {\n  // Conversations\n  upsertConversation: (convoData) => API.post('/conversations', convoData),\n  getConversation: () => API.get(`/conversations`),\n\n  // Chat\n  sendMessage: (messageData) => API.post('/call', messageData),\n\n  // Account\n  getAccount: () => API.get('/account'),\n  updateAccount: (accountData) => API.put('/account', accountData),\n\n  // Purchase Tokens\n  purchaseTokens: (tokens) => API.post('/purchase-tokens', { tokens }),\n\n  // Account\n  createAccount: (accountData) => API.post('/signup', accountData),\n  login: (loginData) => API.post('/login', loginData),\n};\n",

Yo ya se que archivo quiero abrir\n    ']

Soy Coder, Puedo ayudarte a entender, depurar y mejorar tu c\u00f3digo. Preg\u00fantame sobre funciones, errores, refactorizaci\u00f3n o cualquier duda t\u00e9cnica.', timestamp: new Date() }]);\n        }\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        loadConversation();\n    }, []); \n\n\n    const handleSend = async () => {\n        if (!message) return;\n\n        const messageWritten = message;\n        setMessage('');\n\n        const newMessage = { role: 'user', content: messageWritten, timestamp: new Date() };\n        setConversation((prev) => [...prev, newMessage]);\n\n        try {\n            const response = await api.sendMessage({ message: messageWritten });\n            const aiMessage = {\n                role: 'assistant',\n                content: response.data.response,\n                timestamp: new Date()\n            };\n            setConversation((prev) => [...prev, aiMessage]);\n        } catch (error) {\n            setConversation((prev) => prev.slice(0, -1));\n        }\n        setMessage('');\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth'});\n    }, [conversation]);\n\n    return (\n        <Box className=\"chat-container\">\n            {/* Chat Messages */}\n            <Box className=\"chat-messages\">\n                {conversation.map((msg, index) => (\n                    <Box\n                        key={index}\n                        className={`chat-message ${msg.role === 'user' ?       "code": "import axios from 'axios';\nimport { useAuth } from './context/AuthContext';\nimport { useEffect } from 'react';\n\nconst API = axios.create({\n  baseURL: 'http://localhost:5000',\n});\n\n// Funci\u00f3n para configurar el token\nconst setAuthToken = (token) => {\n  if (token) {\n    API.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;\n  } else {\n    delete API.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'];\n  }\n};\n\n// Componente que envuelve las llamadas a la API\nexport const ApiProvider = ({ children }) => {\n  const { token } = useAuth();\n\n  // Configura el token cada vez que cambie\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const storedToken = localStorage.getItem('token');\n    setAuthToken(storedToken);\n  }, [token]);\n\n  return children;\n};\n\nexport default {\n  // Conversations\n  upsertConversation: (convoData) => API.post('/conversations', convoData),\n  getConversation: () => API.get(`/conversations`),\n\n  // Chat\n  sendMessage: (messageData) => API.post('/call', messageData),\n\n  // Account\n  getAccount: () => API.get('/account'),\n  updateAccount: (accountData) => API.put('/account', accountData),\n\n  // Purchase Tokens\n  purchaseTokens: (tokens) => API.post('/purchase-tokens', { tokens }),\n\n  // Account\n  createAccount: (accountData) => API.post('/signup', accountData),\n  login: (loginData) => API.post('/login', loginData),\n};\n",

useNavigate();\n    const [directoryTree, setDirectoryTree] = useState([]);\n    const [fileContent, setFileContent] = useState('');\n\n    const handleOpenFolder = async () => {\n        const folderHandle = await window.showDirectoryPicker();\n        console.log('folderHandle:', folderHandle);\n        const files = await getFilesFromDirectory(folderHandle);\n        console.log('files:', files);\n        setDirectoryTree(files);\n    };\n\n    const getFilesFromDirectory = async (folderHandle) => {\n        const files = [];\n        for await (const entry of folderHandle.values()) {\n            if (entry.kind === 'file') {\n                const file = await entry.getFile();\n                const content = await file.text();\n                files.push({ name: file.name, path: file.webkitRelativePath, content });\n            } else if (entry.kind === 'directory' && entry.name !== 'node_modules') {\n                const subFiles = await getFilesFromDirectory(entry);\n                files.push({ name: entry.name, path: entry.name, children: subFiles });\n            }\n        }\n        return files;\n    };\n\n    const handleFileClick = async (file) => {\n        console.log('file:', file);\n        try {\n            const content = file.content\n            setFileContent(content);\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('Error al abrir el archivo:', error);\n        }\n    };\n\n    const handleSyncWithServer = () => {\n        console.log('Sincronizando con el servidor...');\n        // Aqu\u00ed puedes agregar la l\u00f3gica para enviar el contenido al backend\n    };\n\n    const renderDirectoryTree = (files) => {\n        return (\n            <ul>\n                {files.map((file, index) => (\n                    <li key={index}>\n                        {file.children ? (\n                            <span>{file.name}</span>\n                        ) : (\n                            <span onClick={() => handleFileClick(file)}>{file.name}</span>\n                        )}\n                        {file.children && renderDirectoryTree(file.children)}\n                    </li>\n                ))}\n            </ul>\n        );\n    };\n\n    return (\n        <div>\n            <h1>Abrir Carpeta</h1>\n            <button onClick={handleOpenFolder}>Seleccionar Carpeta</button>\n            {renderDirectoryTree(directoryTree)}\n            {fileContent && (\n                <div>\n                    <h2>Contenido del Archivo:</h2>\n                    <pre>{fileContent}</pre>\n                </div>\n            )}\n            <button onClick={handleSyncWithServer}>Sincronizar con el Servidor</button>\n            <button onClick={() => navigate('/chat')}>Ir al Chat</button>\n        </div>\n    );\n};\n\nexport default OpenFolder;\n",

      "code": "import React, { useState } from 'react';\nimport { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';\nimport '../styles/OpenFolder.css';\n\nconst OpenFolder = () => {\n    const navigate = useNavigate();\n    const [directoryTree, setDirectoryTree] = useState([]);\n    const [fileContent, setFileContent] = useState('');\n\n    const handleOpenFolder = async () => {\n        const folderHandle = await window.showDirectoryPicker();\n        console.log('folderHandle:', folderHandle);\n        const files = await getFilesFromDirectory(folderHandle);\n        console.log('files:', files);\n        setDirectoryTree(files);\n    };\n\n    const getFilesFromDirectory = async (folderHandle) => {\n        const files = [];\n        for await (const entry of folderHandle.values()) {\n            if (entry.kind === 'file') {\n                const file = await entry.getFile();\n                const content = await file.text();\n                files.push({ name: file.name, path: file.webkitRelativePath, content });\n            } else if (entry.kind === 'directory' && entry.name !== 'node_modules') {\n                const subFiles = await getFilesFromDirectory(entry);\n                files.push({ name: entry.name, path: entry.name, children: subFiles });\n            }\n        }\n        return files;\n    };\n\n    const handleFileClick = async (file) => {\n        console.log('file:', file);\n        try {\n            const content = file.content\n            setFileContent(content);\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('Error al abrir el archivo:', error);\n        }\n    };\n\n    const handleSyncWithServer = () => {\n        console.log('Sincronizando con el servidor...');\n        // Aqu\u00ed puedes agregar la l\u00f3gica para enviar el contenido al backend\n    };\n\n    const renderDirectoryTree = (files) => {\n        return (\n            <ul>\n                {files.map((file, index) => (\n                    <li key={index}>\n                        {file.children ? (\n                            <span>{file.name}</span>\n                        ) : (\n                            <span onClick={() => handleFileClick(file)}>{file.name}</span>\n                        )}\n                        {file.children && renderDirectoryTree(file.children)}\n                    </li>\n                ))}\n            </ul>\n        );\n    };\n\n    return (\n        <div>\n            <h1>Abrir Carpeta</h1>\n            <button onClick={handleOpenFolder}>Seleccionar Carpeta</button>\n            {renderDirectoryTree(directoryTree)}\n            {fileContent && (\n                <div>\n                    <h2>Contenido del Archivo:</h2>\n                    <pre>{fileContent}</pre>\n                </div>\n            )}\n            <button onClick={handleSyncWithServer}>Sincronizar con el Servidor</button>\n            <button onClick={() => navigate('/chat')}>Ir al Chat</button>\n        </div>\n    );\n};\n\nexport default OpenFolder;\n",

default function AccountSettings() {\n    const [email, setEmail] = useState('');\n    const [username, setUsername] = useState('');\n    const [password, setPassword] = useState('');\n    const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n    const [message, setMessage] = useState('');\n    const [severity, setSeverity] = useState('success');\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        // Fetch current account settings\n        const fetchAccountSettings = async () => {\n            try {\n                const response = await api.get('/account');\n                setEmail(response.data.email);\n                setUsername(response.data.username);\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error('Error fetching account settings:', error);\n            }\n        };\n        fetchAccountSettings();\n    }, []);\n\n    const handleSubmit = async (e) => {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        try {\n            await api.put('/account', { email, username, password });\n            setMessage('Configuraci\u00f3n de cuenta actualizada exitosamente.');\n            setSeverity('success');\n            setOpen(true);\n            setPassword('');\n        } catch (error) {\n    \n        setDirectoryTree(files);\n    };\n\n    const getFilesFromDirectory = async (folderHandle) => {\n        const files = [];\n        for await (const entry of folderHandle.values()) {\n            if (entry.kind === 'file') {\n                const file = await entry.getFile();\n                const content = await file.text();\n                files.push({ name: file.name, path: file.webkitRelativePath, content });\n            } else if (entry.kind === 'directory' && !['node_modules', 'build'].includes(entry.name) && entry.name[0] !== '.') {\n                const subFiles = await getFilesFromDirectory(entry);\n                files.push({ name: entry.name, path: entry.name, children: subFiles });\n            }\n        }\n        return files;\n    };\n\n    const handleFileClick = async (file) => {\n        console.log('file:', file);\n        try {\n            const content = file.content\n            setFileContent(content);\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('Error al abrir el archivo:', error);\n        }\n    };\n\n    const handleSyncWithServer = () => {\n        console.log('Sincronizando con el servidor...');\n        // Aqu\u00ed puedes agregar la l\u00f3gica para enviar el contenido al backend\n    };\n\n    const renderDirectoryTree = (files) => {\n        return (\n            <ul>\n                {files.map((file, index) => (\n                    <li key={index}>\n                        {file.children ? (\n                            <span>{file.name}</span>\n                        ) : (\n                            <span onClick={() => handleFileClick(file)}>{file.name}</span>\n                        )}\n                        {file.children && renderDirectoryTree(file.children)}\n                    </li>\n                ))}\n            </ul>\n        );\n    };\n\n    return (\n        <div className='open-folder'>\n            <h1>Abrir Carpeta</h1>\n            <button onClick={handleOpenFolder}>Seleccionar Carpeta</button>\n            <button onClick={() => handleRefresh()}>Actualizar Contenido</button>\n            <button onClick={handleSyncWithServer}>Sincronizar con el Servidor</button>\n            <button onClick={() => navigate('/chat')}>Ir al Chat</button>\n            <div className='editor'>\n            {renderDirectoryTree(directoryTree)}\n            {fileContent && (\n                <div>\n                    <h2>Contenido del Archivo:</h2>\n                    <pre>{fileContent}</pre>\n                </div>\n            )}\n            </div>\n            \n        </div>\n    );\n};\n\nexport default OpenFolder;\n",

Soy Coder, Puedo ayudarte a entender, depurar y mejorar tu c\u00f3digo. Preg\u00fantame sobre funciones, errores, refactorizaci\u00f3n o cualquier duda t\u00e9cnica.', timestamp: new Date() }]);\n        }\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        loadConversation();\n    }, []); \n\n\n    const handleSend = async () => {\n        if (!message) return;\n\n        const messageWritten = message;\n        setMessage('');\n\n        const newMessage = { role: 'user', content: messageWritten, timestamp: new Date() };\n        setConversation((prev) => [...prev, newMessage]);\n\n        try {\n            const response = await api.sendMessage({ message: messageWritten });\n            const aiMessage = {\n                role: 'assistant',\n                content: response.data.response,\n                timestamp: new Date()\n            };\n            setConversation((prev) => [...prev, aiMessage]);\n        } catch (error) {\n            setConversation((prev) => prev.slice(0, -1));\n        }\n        setMessage('');\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth'});\n    }, [conversation]);\n\n    return (\n        <Box className=\"chat-container\">\n            {/* Chat Messages */}\n            <Box className=\"chat-messages\">\n                {conversation.map((msg, index) => (\n                    <Box\n                        key={index}\n                        className={`chat-message ${msg.role === 'user' ?       "code": "import React, { useState } from 'react';\nimport { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';\nimport '../styles/OpenFolder.css';\n\nconst OpenFolder = () => {\n    const navigate = useNavigate();\n    const [directoryTree, setDirectoryTree] = useState([]);\n    const [fileContent, setFileContent] = useState('');\n    const [folderHandle, setFolderHandle] = useState(null);\n\n    const handleOpenFolder = async () => {\n        const folderHandle = await window.showDirectoryPicker();\n        setFolderHandle(folderHandle);\n        const files = await getFilesFromDirectory(folderHandle);\n        setDirectoryTree(files);\n    };\n\n    const handleRefresh = async () => {\n        const files = await getFilesFromDirectory(folderHandle);    \n        setDirectoryTree(files);\n    };\n\n    const getFilesFromDirectory = async (folderHandle) => {\n        const files = [];\n        for await (const entry of folderHandle.values()) {\n            if (entry.kind === 'file') {\n                const file = await entry.getFile();\n                const content = await file.text();\n                files.push({ name: file.name, path: file.webkitRelativePath, content });\n            } else if (entry.kind === 'directory' && !['node_modules', 'build'].includes(entry.name) && entry.name[0] !== '.') {\n                const subFiles = await getFilesFromDirectory(entry);\n                files.push({ name: entry.name, path: entry.name, children: subFiles });\n            }\n        }\n        return files;\n    };\n\n    const handleFileClick = async (file) => {\n        console.log('file:', file);\n        try {\n            const content = file.content\n            setFileContent(content);\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('Error al abrir el archivo:', error);\n        }\n    };\n\n    const handleSyncWithServer = () => {\n        console.log('Sincronizando con el servidor...');\n        // Aqu\u00ed puedes agregar la l\u00f3gica para enviar el contenido al backend\n    };\n\n    const renderDirectoryTree = (files) => {\n        return (\n            <ul>\n                {files.map((file, index) => (\n                    <li key={index}>\n                        {file.children ? (\n                            <span>{file.name}</span>\n                        ) : (\n                            <span onClick={() => handleFileClick(file)}>{file.name}</span>\n                        )}\n                        {file.children && renderDirectoryTree(file.children)}\n                    </li>\n                ))}\n            </ul>\n        );\n    };\n\n    return (\n        <div className='open-folder'>\n            <h1>Abrir Carpeta</h1>\n            <button onClick={handleOpenFolder}>Seleccionar Carpeta</button>\n            <button onClick={() => handleRefresh()}>Actualizar Contenido</button>\n            <button onClick={handleSyncWithServer}>Sincronizar con el Servidor</button>\n            <button onClick={() => navigate('/chat')}>Ir al Chat</button>\n            <div className='editor'>\n            {renderDirectoryTree(directoryTree)}\n            {fileContent && (\n                <div>\n                    <h2>Contenido del Archivo:</h2>\n                    <pre>{fileContent}</pre>\n                </div>\n            )}\n            </div>\n            \n        </div>\n    );\n};\n\nexport default OpenFolder;\n",

      "code": "import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';\nimport { Box, TextField, Button, Typography, Avatar, Paper } from '@mui/material';\nimport SendIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Send';\nimport SmartToyIcon from '@mui/icons-material/SmartToy';\nimport api from '../../api';\nimport '../../styles/App.css';\n\nexport default function ChatInterface() {\n    const [message, setMessage] = useState('');\n    const [conversation, setConversation] = useState([]);\n    const messagesEndRef = useRef(null);\n\n    const loadConversation = async () => {\n        try {\n            const response = await api.getConversation();\n            setConversation(response.data.messages);\n        } catch (error) {\n            setConversation([{ role: 'assistant', content: '\u00a1Hola! Soy Coder, Puedo ayudarte a entender, depurar y mejorar tu c\u00f3digo. Preg\u00fantame sobre funciones, errores, refactorizaci\u00f3n o cualquier duda t\u00e9cnica.', timestamp: new Date() }]);\n        }\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        loadConversation();\n    }, []); \n\n\n    const handleSend = async () => {\n        if (!message) return;\n\n        const messageWritten = message;\n        setMessage('');\n\n        const newMessage = { role: 'user', content: messageWritten, timestamp: new Date() };\n        setConversation((prev) => [...prev, newMessage]);\n\n        try {\n            const response = await api.sendMessage({ message: messageWritten });\n            const aiMessage = {\n                role: 'assistant',\n                content: response.data.response,\n                timestamp: new Date()\n            };\n            setConversation((prev) => [...prev, aiMessage]);\n        } catch (error) {\n            setConversation((prev) => prev.slice(0, -1));\n        }\n        setMessage('');\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth'});\n    }, [conversation]);\n\n    return (\n        <Box className=\"chat-container\">\n            {/* Chat Messages */}\n            <Box className=\"chat-messages\">\n                {conversation.map((msg, index) => (\n                    <Box\n                        key={index}\n                        className={`chat-message ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'user' : 'assistant'}`}\n                    >\n                        <Typography variant=\"body1\">{msg.content}</Typography>\n                        <hr />\n                        <Typography variant=\"caption\" sx={{ color: '#ffffff86' }}>\n                        {new Date(msg.timestamp).toDateString().split(' ')[2]} {new Date(msg.timestamp).toDateString().split(' ')[1]}, {new Date(msg.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: \"2-digit\", minute: \"2-digit\" })}\n                        </Typography>\n                    </Box>\n                ))}\n                <div ref={messagesEndRef} />\n            </Box>\n\n            {/* Message Input */}\n            <Paper className=\"chat-input\" elevation={1} sx={{display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'row', boxShadow: 'none'}}>\n                <TextField\n                    fullWidth\n                    variant=\"outlined\"\n                    placeholder=\"Type your message...\"\n                    value={message}\n                    onChange={(e) => setMessage(e.target.value)}\n                    onKeyPress={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleSend()}\n                />\n                <Button\n                    variant=\"contained\"\n                    onClick={handleSend}\n                    disabled={!message}\n                    endIcon={<SendIcon />}\n                >\n                </Button>\n            </Paper>\n        </Box>\n    );\n}",

      "code": "import axios from 'axios';\nimport { useAuth } from './context/AuthContext';\nimport { useEffect } from 'react';\n\nconst API = axios.create({\n  baseURL: 'http://localhost:5000',\n});\n\n// Funci\u00f3n para configurar el token\nconst setAuthToken = (token) => {\n  if (token) {\n    API.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;\n  } else {\n    delete API.defaults.headers.common['Authorization'];\n  }\n};\n\n// Componente que envuelve las llamadas a la API\nexport const ApiProvider = ({ children }) => {\n  const { token } = useAuth();\n\n  // Configura el token cada vez que cambie\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const storedToken = localStorage.getItem('token');\n    setAuthToken(storedToken);\n  }, [token]);\n\n  return children;\n};\n\nexport default {\n  // Conversations\n  upsertConversation: (convoData) => API.post('/conversations', convoData),\n  getConversation: () => API.get(`/conversations`),\n\n  // Chat\n  sendMessage: (messageData) => API.post('/call', messageData),\n\n  // Account\n  getAccount: () => API.get('/account'),\n  updateAccount: (accountData) => API.put('/account', accountData),\n\n  // Purchase Tokens\n  purchaseTokens: (tokens) => API.post('/purchase-tokens', { tokens }),\n\n  // Account\n  createAccount: (accountData) => API.post('/signup', accountData),\n  login: (loginData) => API.post('/login', loginData),\n};\n",

Int\u00e9ntalo de nuevo.');\n                setSeverity('error');\n                setOpen(true);\n            }\n        };\n        fetchSaldo();\n    }, []);\n\n    const handlePurchase = async (plan) => {\n        try {\n            await api.post('/purchase-tokens', { tokens: plan.tokens });\n            setMessage(`Has recargado $${plan.price} y a\u00f1adido ${plan.tokens} tokens a tu saldo.`);\n            setSeverity('success');\n            setOpen(true);\n            // Actualizar el saldo despu\u00e9s de la compra\n            const response = await api.getAccount();\n            setSaldo(response.data.tokens);\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('Error al comprar tokens:', error);\n            setMessage('Error al procesar la recarga. setOpen(true);\n        }\n    };\n\n    const handleClose = () => {\n        setOpen(false);\n    };\n\n    return (\n        <Container maxWidth=\"sm\">\n            <Box sx={{ mt: 8, p: 4, bgcolor: Please try again.');\n        }\n    };\n\n    return (\n        <Container maxWidth=\"xs\" className=\"section_gap_top\">\n            <Box className=\"white_bg box-shadow border-radius p-25 Crear Nueva Cuenta\n                </Typography>\n\n                {error && (\n                    <Typography variant=\"body1\" color=\"error\" className=\"error-message mb-15\">\n       "code": "import { BrowserRouter as Router, Routes, Route } from 'react-router-dom';\nimport { Box } from '@mui/material';\nimport Login from './components/Auth/Login';\nimport SignUp from './components/Auth/SignUp';\nimport ChatInterface from './components/Chat/ChatInterface';\nimport AccountSettings from './components/AccountSettings.jsx';\nimport Menu from './components/Menu.jsx';\nimport Pricing from './components/Pricing.jsx';\nimport Docs from './components/Docs.jsx';\nimport { useAuth } from './context/AuthContext';\nimport React from 'react';\nimport './styles/App.css';\nimport OpenFolder from './components/OpenFolder.jsx';\nimport { ApiProvider } from './api';\n\nfunction App() {\n    return (\n        <ApiProvider>\n            <Router>\n                <MainApp />\n            </Router>\n        </ApiProvider>\n    );\n}\n\nfunction MainApp() {\n    const { email } = useAuth();\n\n    return (\n        <div className=\"App\">\n            {email && <Menu />}\n            <Box>\n                <Routes>\n                    {!email ? (\n                        <>\n                            <Route path=\"/\" element={<Login />} />\n                            <Route path=\"/login\" element={<Login />} />\n                            <Route path=\"/signup\" element={<SignUp />} />\n                        </>\n                    ) : (\n                        <>\n                            <Route path=\"/account\" element={<AccountSettings />} />\n                            <Route path=\"/pricing\" element={<Pricing />} />\n                            <Route path=\"/docs\" element={<Docs />} />\n                        </>\n                    )}\n                    <Route path=\"*\" element={email ? <OpenFolder /> : <Login />} />\n                </Routes>\n            </Box>\n        </div>\n    );\n}\n\nexport default App;\n",

default function AccountSettings() {\n    const [email, setEmail] = useState('');\n    const [username, setUsername] = useState('');\n    const [password, setPassword] = useState('');\n    const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n    const [message, setMessage] = useState('');\n    const [severity, setSeverity] = useState('success');\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        // Fetch current account settings\n        const fetchAccountSettings = async () => {\n            try {\n                const response = await api.get('/account');\n                setEmail(response.data.email);\n                setUsername(response.data.username);\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error('Error fetching account settings:', error);\n            }\n        };\n        fetchAccountSettings();\n    }, []);\n\n    const handleSubmit = async (e) => {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        try {\n            await api.put('/account', { email, username, password });\n            setMessage('Configuraci\u00f3n de cuenta actualizada exitosamente.');\n            setSeverity('success');\n            setOpen(true);\n            setPassword('');\n        } catch (error) {\n setOpen(true);\n        }\n    };\n\n    const handleClose = () => {\n        setOpen(false);\n    };\n\n    return (\n        <Container maxWidth=\"sm\">\n            <Box sx={{ mt: 8, p: 4, bgcolor:       "code": "import React, { useState } from 'react';\nimport { useNavigate, Link as RouterLink } from 'react-router-dom';\nimport { Container, Box, Typography, Button, TextField, Link } from '@mui/material';\nimport PersonAddIcon from '@mui/icons-material/PersonAdd';\nimport { useAuth } from '../../context/AuthContext';\n\nexport default function SignUp() {\n    const [email, setEmail] = useState('');\n    const [username, setUsername] = useState('');\n    const [password, setPassword] = useState('');\n    const navigate = useNavigate();\n    const { signUp } = useAuth();\n    const [error, setError] = useState('');\n\n    const handleSubmit = async (e) => {\n        e.preventDefault();\n        try {\n            await signUp(email, password, username);\n            navigate('/agents');\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('SignUp failed:', error);\n            setError('Failed to create account. Please try again.');\n        }\n    };\n\n    return (\n        <Container maxWidth=\"xs\" className=\"section_gap_top\">\n            <Box className=\"white_bg box-shadow border-radius p-25 text-center mb-50\">\n                <PersonAddIcon className=\"icon-large primary-color mb-15\" />\n                <Typography variant=\"h4\" className=\"main-title mb-25\">\n                    Crear Nueva Cuenta\n                </Typography>\n\n                {error && (\n                    <Typography variant=\"body1\" color=\"error\" className=\"error-message mb-15\">\n                        {error}\n                    </Typography>\n                )}\n\n                <Box component=\"form\" onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"form-container\">\n                    <TextField\n                        fullWidth\n                        margin=\"normal\"\n                        label=\"Email\"\n                        type=\"email\"\n                        required\n                        value={email}\n                        onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}\n                        className=\"single-input mb-15\"\n                    />\n\n                    <TextField\n                        fullWidth\n                        margin=\"normal\"\n                        label=\"Nombre de Usuario\"\n                        type=\"text\"\n                        required\n                        value={username}\n                        onChange={(e) => setUsername(e.target.value)}\n                        className=\"single-input mb-15\"\n                    />\n\n                    <TextField\n                        fullWidth\n                        margin=\"normal\"\n                        label=\"Contrase\u00f1a\"\n                        type=\"password\"\n                        required\n                        value={password}\n                        onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}\n                        className=\"single-input mb-25\"\n                    />\n\n                    <Button type=\"submit\" fullWidth className=\"primary_btn\" sx={{marginTop: '1rem', color: 'white'}}>\n                        Registrarse\n                    </Button>\n                </Box>\n\n                <Typography variant=\"body2\" sx={{marginTop: '30px'}}>\n                    <Link component={RouterLink} to=\"/login\" className=\"link-style\">\n                        Ya tienes una cuenta, inicia sesion aqui\n                    </Link>\n                </Typography>\n            </Box>\n        </Container>\n    );\n}",

      "code": "import { BrowserRouter as Router, Routes, Route } from 'react-router-dom';\nimport { Box } from '@mui/material';\nimport Login from './components/Auth/Login';\nimport SignUp from './components/Auth/SignUp';\nimport ChatInterface from './components/Chat/ChatInterface';\nimport AccountSettings from './components/AccountSettings.jsx';\nimport Menu from './components/Menu.jsx';\nimport Pricing from './components/Pricing.jsx';\nimport Docs from './components/Docs.jsx';\nimport { useAuth } from './context/AuthContext';\nimport React from 'react';\nimport './styles/App.css';\nimport OpenFolder from './components/OpenFolder.jsx';\nimport { ApiProvider } from './api';\n\nfunction App() {\n    return (\n        <ApiProvider>\n            <Router>\n                <MainApp />\n            </Router>\n        </ApiProvider>\n    );\n}\n\nfunction MainApp() {\n    const { email } = useAuth();\n\n    return (\n        <div className=\"App\">\n            {email && <Menu />}\n            <Box>\n                <Routes>\n                    {!email ? (\n                        <>\n                            <Route path=\"/\" element={<Login />} />\n                            <Route path=\"/login\" element={<Login />} />\n                            <Route path=\"/signup\" element={<SignUp />} />\n                        </>\n                    ) : (\n                        <>\n                            <Route path=\"/account\" element={<AccountSettings />} />\n                            <Route path=\"/pricing\" element={<Pricing />} />\n                            <Route path=\"/docs\" element={<Docs />} />\n                        </>\n                    )}\n                    <Route path=\"*\" element={email ? <OpenFolder /> : <Login />} />\n                </Routes>\n            </Box>\n        </div>\n    );\n}\n\nexport default App;\n",

      "code": "import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';\nimport { Box, TextField, Button, Typography, Avatar, Paper } from '@mui/material';\nimport SendIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Send';\nimport SmartToyIcon from '@mui/icons-material/SmartToy';\nimport api from '../../api';\nimport '../../styles/App.css';\n\nexport default function ChatInterface() {\n    const [message, setMessage] = useState('');\n    const [conversation, setConversation] = useState([]);\n    const messagesEndRef = useRef(null);\n\n    const loadConversation = async () => {\n        try {\n            const response = await api.getConversation();\n            setConversation(response.data.messages);\n        } catch (error) {\n            setConversation([{ role: 'assistant', content: '\u00a1Hola! Puedo ayudarte a entender, depurar y mejorar tu c\u00f3digo. Preg\u00fantame sobre funciones, errores, refactorizaci\u00f3n o cualquier duda t\u00e9cnica.', timestamp: new Date() }]);\n        }\n    };\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        loadConversation();\n    }, []); \n\n\n    const handleSend = async () => {\n        if (!message) return;\n\n        const messageWritten = message;\n        setMessage('');\n\n        const newMessage = { role: 'user', content: messageWritten, timestamp: new Date() };\n        setConversation((prev) => [...prev, newMessage]);\n\n        try {\n            const response = await api.sendMessage({ message: messageWritten });\n            const aiMessage = {\n                role: 'assistant',\n                content: response.data.response,\n                timestamp: new Date()\n            };\n            setConversation((prev) => [...prev, aiMessage]);\n        } catch (error) {\n            setConversation((prev) => prev.slice(0, -1));\n        }\n        setMessage('');\n    };\n\n    return (\n        <Box className=\"chat-container\">\n            {/* Chat Messages */}\n            <Box className=\"chat-messages\">\n                {conversation.map((msg, index) => (\n                    <Box\n                        key={index}\n                        className={`chat-message ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'user' : 'assistant'}`}\n                    >\n                        <Typography variant=\"body1\">{msg.content}</Typography>\n                        <hr />\n                        <Typography variant=\"caption\" sx={{ color: '#ffffff86' }}>\n                        {new Date(msg.timestamp).toDateString().split(' ')[2]} {new Date(msg.timestamp).toDateString().split(' ')[1]}, {new Date(msg.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: \"2-digit\", minute: \"2-digit\" })}\n                        </Typography>\n                    </Box>\n                ))}\n                <div ref={messagesEndRef} />\n            </Box>\n\n            {/* Message Input */}\n            <Paper className=\"chat-input\" elevation={1} sx={{display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'row', boxShadow: 'none'}}>\n                <TextField\n                    fullWidth\n                    variant=\"outlined\"\n                    placeholder=\"Type your message...\"\n                    value={message}\n                    onChange={(e) => setMessage(e.target.value)}\n                    onKeyPress={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && handleSend()}\n                />\n                <Button\n                    variant=\"contained\"\n                    onClick={handleSend}\n                    disabled={!message}\n                    endIcon={<SendIcon />}\n                >\n                </Button>\n            </Paper>\n        </Box>\n    );\n}",
